g.title: firewallConn
g.text: Wires that pass to truck side at firewall. OEM connector P/N TODO — verify against body harness.

g.title: ecmBattPlus
g.text: A209 16RD × 3 — firewall to ECM C2 pins 20, 30, 40

g.title: ecmGnd
g.text: Z902 16BK × 3 — ECM C2 pins 21, 49, 50 to firewall/chassis

g.title: ecmIgnWire
g.text: F202 18PK/GY — ignition switch output to ECM C2-32

g.title: ccdBusCable
g.text: D72 18WT/LB (CCD+) and D71 18WT/DB (CCD-) — ECM C1-4/5 to firewall

g.title: sciCable
g.text: D21 18PK (TX) and D20 18WT/LG (RX) — ECM C2-16/19 to firewall

g.title: fuelHeaterCable
g.text: Z816 14BK (ground), A961 14RD (from fuel heater relay output at firewall)

g.title: vssWire
g.text: B22 18DG/YL — VSS signal from ABS module to ECM C2-11

g.title: brakeSwitchWire
g.text: B29 18DG/WT — brake switch to ECM C2-37

g.title: acClutchWire
g.text: C13 18LB/OR — A/C clutch relay control from ECM C2-41

g.title: iatHeater1Wire
g.text: K174 18BR/YL — IAT heater relay 1 control from ECM C2-6

g.title: iatHeater2Wire
g.text: K176 18BR/OR — IAT heater relay 2 control from ECM C2-5

g.title: fuelLevelWire
g.text: N4 18DB/WT — fuel level sensor signal from ECM C2-26 to truck

g.title: ecmC1
g.text: Sensor inputs, injectors, 5V refs, CCD bus. Mounted driver-side engine block.

g.title: liftPumpCable
g.text: N2 18DB/YL (lift pump feed from ECM C1-45), Z816 18BK (ground)

g.title: genCable
g.text: K20 18BR/GY (gen field control from ECM C1-7), Z816 18BK (ground)

g.title: coolantTempSensor
g.text: FSM: cav A=K914 18BR/WT, cav B=K2 18VT/OR. Late-style — must swap on early 2003 engines.

g.title: mapIatSensor
g.text: FSM: cav A=K916, B=K21, C=F855, D=K37. In top of intake manifold.

g.title: waterInFuelSensor
g.text: FSM: cav A=K914 18BR/WT, cav B=G123 18VT/LG. On fuel filter/water separator.

g.title: opsWire
g.text: G6 18VT/GY — oil pressure signal to ECM C2-12

g.title: fuelRailPressureSensor
g.text: FSM: 1=K915 18BR/BK, 2=K181 18VT/RD, 3=F855 18PK/YL. CP3 fuel rail pressure sensor.

g.title: fuelRailPressureSensorCable
g.text: K915 18BR/BK (fuel rail sensor ground), K181 18VT/RD (fuel rail sensor signal), F855 18PK/YL (fuel rail sensor 5V)

g.title: chassisGnd
g.text: Z816 circuit — engine block or chassis ground stud. Shared by generator, lift pump, and fuel heater.

g.title: fuelHeater
g.text: FSM: A=Z816 14BK, B=A961 14RD. Power from fuel heater relay, not ECM.

g.title: fanCable
g.text: K160 (fan PWM), K900 (snd gnd), K161 (fan speed), NC, F856 (5V), F504 (IGN fused run from firewall)

g.title: injPack1Cable
g.text: K227/K12/K227/K11 — bank1 high side + cyl 2 low + bank1 high side + cyl 1 low

g.title: injPack2Cable
g.text: K229/K14/K227/K13 — bank2 high side + cyl 4 low + bank1 high side + cyl 3 low

g.title: injPack3Cable
g.text: K229/K58/K229/K38 — bank2 high side + cyl 6 low + bank2 high side + cyl 5 low

g.title: appsAt
g.text: A/T bell-crank APPS on intake manifold. Use appsAt OR appsMt — not both.
